tr.td:
albuterol (albuterol CFC free 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol)
Status: Ordered
Start Date: 9/22/25
2 Inhalation Oral Inhalation Every 4 Hours as needed cough, wheeze, or difficulty breathing; take with spacer. Refills: 0.
Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

beclomethasone (Qvar Redihaler 40 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol)
Status: Ordered
Start Date: 9/22/25
2 Inhalation Oral Inhalation Twice Daily. rinse mouth and throat after use. Refills: 0.
Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

Start Date: 8/28/23

Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

item.paragraph:
Soong MD, Derrick L: PERFORM
Event Display: Ped Well Child Check
Authored Date: 20221219105128-0800

Assessment/Plan
_
WCC (well child check), Well child visit
Growth and Development: Normal for age.
Immunizations: Up to date.
Counseling on Nutrition, Physical Activity, School readiness.
Anticipatory Guidance: Standard age appropriate handout given.
Picky eater - advised to work on getting him to try everything once before he can refuse it at every meal.
Follow-up: Routine follow-up 1 year.
Chief Complaint
WCC
History of Present Illness
Concerns:
1. Eating habits - will eat dumplings with vegetables in it, will eat peas.
NUTRITION: Drinking appropriate amount of milk. No concerns about weight or eating habits. Eats a good variety of foods. Doesn't do well with vegetables.
DEVELOPMENT/BEHAVIOR: No concerns.
Development Screen:
Can your child run, jump, hop, and skip? YES
Can your child get dressed without help? YES
Does your child have a best friend? YES
Does your child know his or her own telephone number? Working on.
Can your child draw a picture of a person? YES
Is your child learning the alphabet? YES
Do you have any concerns about your child's readiness for kindergarten? NO
ELIMINATION: Bowel movements are normal. No daytime accidents. No bedwetting.
SLEEP: Sleeping through the night.
DENTITION: Brushing teeth.
MEDIA: Not greater than 1 hour/day.
VISION: No vision concerns. Strabismus as a kid, hasn't followed up.
HEARING: No hearing concerns.
SAFETY: No significant issues identified.
See scanned questionnaire for additional information.
Review of Systems
Pertinent systems reviewed and negative except as per HPI
Physical Exam
Vitals & Measurements
HR: 96(Pulse) BP: 102/58
WT: 15.70 kg BMI: 14.38
GEN APPEARANCE: Alert, engaging, pink, no apparent distress. Well developed. Well nourished.
HEENT:
Head: Normocephalic.
Eyes: B/L RR. Conjunctivae pink without discharge. Corneal light reflex symmetric. Extraocular muscles intact. Pupils equal, round, react to light and accommodation. Cover/uncover - test - normal alignment.
Ears: B/L normal canals. B/L tympanic membranes with normal landmarks; no erythema.
Nose: Clear. No discharge.
Mouth/throat: No oral lesions. The pharynx is without exudates or erythema. Dentition healthy.
NECK: Supple. No significant lymphadenopathy.
LUNGS: Clear to auscultation with equal breath sounds. No wheezes, rales or rhonchi.
HEART: Regular rate and rhythm. No murmur. Femoral pulse 2+ and equal.
ABDOMEN: Soft, nontender, normal bowel sounds. No hepatosplenomegaly. No masses.
GENITOURINARY: Normal genitalia. testes descended bilaterally, no hernia, no masses, tanner stage 1
SKIN: No rashes noted.
EXTREMITIES: UE - Normal ROM. LE Normal ROM.
NEUROLOGIC: Normal tone. Cranial nerves grossly intact. Motor/sensory grossly normal.
SPINE: Normal curvature with no defects or dimples.
External Vitals & Measurements
No qualifying data available.
Growth Percentiles
BMI Percentile: 16.02 % (12/19/22 10:21:00)
Height Percentile: 13.42 % (12/19/22 10:21:00)
Weight Percentile: 7.36 % (12/19/22 10:21:00)
Hearing and Vision Screenings
Vision Screen Results
Event Name
Event Result
Date/Time
Eye, Right Visual Acuity
Other: eye doctor
12/19/22 10:21:00
Hearing Screen Results
Event Name
Event Result
Date/Time
Hearing Test
Screening
12/19/22 10:21:00
L Ear dB at 1000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
R Ear dB at 1000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
L Ear dB at 2000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
R Ear dB at 2000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
L Ear dB at 4000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
R Ear dB at 4000 FQ
25
12/19/22 10:21:00
Problem List/Past Medical History
Ongoing
Abdominal pain
Birth mark Comments: forehead
Chromosomal microduplication
Hemangioma
Prematurity
Strabismus
Historical
No qualifying data
Medications
Albuterol (Eqv-ProAir HFA) 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 1 puff(s), ORAL INH, Q6 Hours, PRN
Vitamin D, Daily
Allergies
NKA
Social History
Home/Environment
Lives with Father, Mother, Siblings, Grandmother.
Family History
Allergies: Mother and Father.
Anxiety: Mother.
Depression: Mother.
Diabetes mellitus type 2: Sister.
Eczema: Father and Pat. GFather.
Health Maintenance
Pending (in the next year)
OverDue
Ped - well child check due 11/11/22 and every 1 year(s)
Satisfied (in the past 1 year)
There are no satisfied recommendations within the defined date range
(Electronically Signed on 12/19/22 10:51 AM)
Soong MD, Derrick L
